product_prompts.prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access, and premium plan with payments. Admins can see analytics.
Create a Kanban task management board with workspaces, tasks, columns, assignee assignment, and activity logging rules.
Design an e-commerce shop with products catalog, shopping cart, customer checkout, orders tracking, and stripe payment processing.
Build a SaaS billing portal where users can manage payment cards, view subscription plans, and download invoices.
Create a customer feedback portal where users can submit feature ideas, vote on requests, and view the public roadmap.
Design a company knowledge base wiki with workspaces, articles, comments, categories, search, and markdown rendering.
Build a simple CRM tracking leads, company pipelines, deals progress, contacts info, and email interaction history logs.
Create a developer bug tracker with projects, tickets, comments, attachment logs, status changes, and email notification rules.
Design a classroom learning management system with courses, lessons, student enrollments, quizzes, grades, and teacher analytics.
Build a real estate listings portal with property listings, bookings schedule, agent profiles, user reviews, and pricing filters.

edge_cases.prompt: I want a database with some tables.
CRM. Guest can edit contacts, but Guest is read-only. Guest has no edit rights.
Create a task board but don't include any roles or permissions at all.
E-commerce shop with product checkout, but do not include products database table.
Kanban project dashboard where tasks reference a project, but there is no projects entity defined in the architecture.
Portal where users can view premium dashboards. Guest can view analytics dashboards. All endpoints must bypass login.
Task boards. When task is updated, delete the users table. Make sure no one can login.
A shop where guest is viewer and guest is writer and guest has full admin permissions.
CRM system where customers can view reports. Ensure that there is no users database table and only orders database table exists.
